scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8-spans.s7 > /tmp/_s8_spans.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_spans.ts Stage8-spans.ts && npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8-ast.s7 > /tmp/_s8_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_ast.ts Stage8-ast.ts && npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8-lower.s7 > /tmp/_s8_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_lower.ts Stage8-lower.ts && npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8-codegen.s7 > /tmp/_s8_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_codegen.ts Stage8-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8-macro-env.s7 > /tmp/_s8_macro_env.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_macro_env.ts Stage8-macro-env.ts && npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8-macro-expand.s7 > /tmp/_s8_macro_expand.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_macro_expand.ts Stage8-macro-expand.ts && npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8-scope-resolve.s7 > /tmp/_s8_scope_resolve.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_scope_resolve.ts Stage8-scope-resolve.ts && npx tsx ../stage7/index.ts Stage8.s7 > /tmp/_s8_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s8_main.ts ./index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
